About: It is about a light, non-motorised, fixed-wing heavier-than-air aircraft called a hang glider.
Affects: It affects builders even of contemporary times.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Federation Aeronautique Internationale and national airspace governing organisations.
BelongsTo: It belongs to an air sport or recreational activity.
BuiltBy: It was built by following the plan in Carl S. Bates' article.
BuiltIn: It was built in the United States.
CausedBy: It is caused by advances in pilot training and glider construction.
ComposedBy: It was composed by a pilot.
ConsistsOf: It consists of an aluminium alloy or composite frame covered with synthetic sailcloth.
CreatedBy: It was created by John Joseph Montgomery.
It was created by Otto Lilienthal.
It was created by Volmer Jensen.
It was created by Francis Rogallo and Gertrude Rogallo.
It was created by Barry Hill Palmer.
It was created by Mike Burns.
It was created by John W. Dickenson.
CreatedFor: It was created for recovery system for the Gemini space capsules.
CreatedTo: It was created to allow safe three-axis control of a foot-launched hang glider.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by John Joseph Montgomery.
DevelopedIn: It was developed in the United States.
HasA: It has a low lift-to-drag ratio.
It has a stiffened flexible wing.
It has a double lateen sail.
It has a triangle control frame.
It has a biplane hang glider.
It has a flexible wing.
It has a kite patent.
It has a fully flexible kited wing.
It has a semi-rigid configuration.
It has a water-ski kite glider.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a pilot flying a light, non-motorised, fixed-wing heavier-than-air aircraft.
It is characterized by a pilot being in a harness suspended from the airframe.
It is characterized by control by shifting body weight in opposition to a control frame.
It is characterized by a low lift-to-drag ratio in early designs.
It is characterized by improved lift-to-drag ratio since the 1980s.
It is characterized by soaring for hours.
It is characterized by gaining thousands of meters of altitude in thermal updrafts.
It is characterized by performing aerobatics.
It is characterized by gliding cross-country for hundreds of kilometers.
It is characterized by regulatory aspects controlled by governing organisations.
HeldIn: It was held in Berck Beach, France.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Otto Lilienthal's rigorously documented work.
InventedBy: It was invented by George Cayley.

It was invented by Francis Rogallo and Gertrude Rogallo.
It was invented by Barry Hill Palmer.
It was invented by Mike Burns.
It was invented by John W. Dickenson.
InventedIn: It was invented in the United States.
IsA: It is an air sport or recreational activity.
It is a light, non-motorised, fixed-wing heavier-than-air aircraft.
It is a modern hang glider.
It is a slope-launched, piloted glider.
It is a controllable glider.
It is a biplane hang glider.
It is a foot-launched hang glider.
It is a kite.
It is a fully flexible kited wing.
It is a flexible wing or Rogallo wing.
KnownAs: It is known as a hang glider.
It is known as a flexible wing or Rogallo wing.
KnownFor: It is known for its low lift-to-drag ratio.
It is known for its improved lift-to-drag ratio.
It is known for soaring for hours.
It is known for gaining thousands of meters of altitude.
It is known for performing aerobatics.
It is known for gliding cross-country.
It is known for its stiffened flexible wing.
It is known for its double lateen sail.
It is known for its triangle control frame.
It is known for its biplane hang glider.
